title: killbind/explode
description: Adds kill/explode keybinds to your options menu
body:
Adds the ability to set a killbind in your keybinds menu

- Killbind
![killbind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/274872a95089b870ae55a709dd5e1766d529e7f8.png)
  
Instantly kills the player when pressed

- Explode
![explode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf9704f92a200dc195b08cb754a9d89cecf47059.png)

Instantly kills the player with a harmless explosion effect (does not destroy blocks or hurt players)
